requirement_topic.zh: EMC 与电气兼容性依据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 與電氣兼容性依據

summary.en: Brazil market documentation should address electromagnetic compatibility and electrical compatibility using applicable ABNT NBR or IEC-based standards, especially when the motor is supplied with drives, controls, sensors, or electronic accessories.
summary.zh: 巴西市场文件应使用适用的 ABNT NBR 或基于 IEC 的标准说明电磁兼容和电气兼容性，尤其是在电机随变频器、控制器、传感器或电子附件供货时。
summary.zht: 巴西市場文件應使用適用的 ABNT NBR 或基於 IEC 的標準說明電磁兼容和電氣兼容性，尤其是在電機隨變頻器、控制器、感測器或電子附件供貨時。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60034 series where adopted or referenced

summary.en: China files may include GB or GB/T EMC and electrical-safety support plus GB 18613 and GB 12665 motor evidence. CCC may also cover certain low-voltage motor or accessory configurations when in scope.
summary.zh: 中国文件可能包括 GB 或 GB/T EMC 及电气安全支持，以及 GB 18613、GB 12665 电机依据。若低压电机或附件配置纳入范围，CCC 也可能适用。
summary.zht: 中國文件可能包括 GB 或 GB/T EMC 及電氣安全支持，以及 GB 18613、GB 12665 電機依據。若低壓電機或附件配置納入範圍，CCC 也可能適用。

standards_or_laws: CCC catalogue requirements for motors under 1 kV where applicable

gap.en: China EMC or CCC files may not map directly to Brazil ABNT NBR expectations. The gap becomes larger when a motor is bundled with a variable-frequency drive because conducted emissions, immunity, installation instructions, and filtering depend on the final system.
gap.zh: 中国 EMC 或 CCC 文件未必能直接映射到巴西 ABNT NBR 预期。当电机与变频器成套供货时，差距更大，因为传导发射、抗扰度、安装说明和滤波取决于最终系统。
gap.zht: 中國 EMC 或 CCC 文件未必能直接映射到巴西 ABNT NBR 預期。當電機與變頻器成套供貨時，差距更大，因為傳導發射、抗擾度、安裝說明和濾波取決於最終系統。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by the applicable INMETRO route, ABNT NBR references, product configuration, or buyer specification
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where China GB, GB/T, or CCC requirements apply to the motor or supplied electronic accessories

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Review EMC at the supplied product-system level; a bare China motor file may not cover a Brazil motor-plus-drive shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应按供货产品系统层级审查 EMC；单独的中国电机文件未必覆盖电机加变频器出口巴西的组合。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應按供貨產品系統層級審查 EMC；單獨的中國電機文件未必覆蓋電機加變頻器出口巴西的組合。

requirement_topic.zh: 电网频率与电压兼容性
requirement_topic.zht: 電網頻率與電壓兼容性

summary.en: Brazil industrial supply is commonly 380/220 V three-phase at 60 Hz, with local installation conditions and utility requirements overseen in the wider power sector by ANEEL. Motor nameplates and instructions must match the intended Brazilian voltage and frequency.
summary.zh: 巴西工业供电常见为三相 380/220 V、60 Hz，地方安装条件及电力行业要求在更广泛层面受 ANEEL 监管。电机铭牌和说明必须匹配拟用巴西电压和频率。
summary.zht: 巴西工業供電常見為三相 380/220 V、60 Hz，地方安裝條件及電力行業要求在更廣泛層面受 ANEEL 監管。電機銘牌和說明必須匹配擬用巴西電壓和頻率。

summary.en: China-market motors are commonly designed for 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz service. Export models may support other voltages or dual ratings, but the exact 60 Hz performance must be documented.
summary.zh: 中国市场电机通常按三相 380 V、50 Hz 使用设计。出口型号可能支持其他电压或双额定值，但具体 60 Hz 性能必须形成文件。
summary.zht: 中國市場電機通常按三相 380 V、50 Hz 使用設計。出口型號可能支持其他電壓或雙額定值，但具體 60 Hz 性能必須形成文件。

standards_or_laws: CCC catalogue requirements for motors under 1 kV where applicable

gap.en: Voltage looks partly familiar, but frequency is different. A China 380 V 50 Hz motor is not automatically compatible with Brazil 380/220 V 60 Hz supply, and 60 Hz operation can alter speed, torque, heating, efficiency, and protection settings.
gap.zh: 电压看似部分相近，但频率不同。中国 380 V 50 Hz 电机不会自动兼容巴西 380/220 V 60 Hz 供电，60 Hz 运行会改变转速、转矩、温升、效率和保护设定。
gap.zht: 電壓看似部分相近，但頻率不同。中國 380 V 50 Hz 電機不會自動兼容巴西 380/220 V 60 Hz 供電，60 Hz 運行會改變轉速、轉矩、溫升、效率和保護設定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory practical requirement for Brazil installation and safety; certification files should match the declared Brazil rating
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory only to the declared China rating and applicable China conformity route

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat 60 Hz and 380/220 V compatibility as a required engineering check before Brazil quotation, certification, or shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在巴西报价、认证或出货前，应将 60 Hz 与 380/220 V 兼容性作为必要工程检查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在巴西報價、認證或出貨前，應將 60 Hz 與 380/220 V 兼容性作為必要工程檢查。
